    static byte[] streamToBytes0(final InputStream in) throws IOException {
        final ByteArrayOutputStream os = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
        final byte[] buf = new byte[4096];
        int read;

            os.write(buf, 0, read);
        }
        return os.toByteArray();
    }

            if (b == c) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }
